title: Q&A Forum
tagline: Full-stack discussion platform with CI/CD from day one
description: A production-ready Q&A forum built with Golang, PostgreSQL, and React. Designed for scalability with a focus on clean API design and a smooth developer experience.

caseStudy.problem: Needed a real-world project that demonstrated end-to-end engineering — from API design through deployment — not just a CRUD app.
caseStudy.solution: Built a full Q&A platform with Golang REST API, PostgreSQL relational schema, React frontend, and automated CI/CD pipeline via GitHub Actions and Docker.

challenges.title: Concurrent vote updates
challenges.how: Used PostgreSQL row-level locking with UPDATE ... RETURNING to safely handle concurrent upvotes without race conditions

challenges.title: Frontend-backend decoupling
challenges.how: Designed a versioned REST API (v1) from the start, allowing independent frontend deployment

architecture: Docker Compose for local dev parity
GitHub Actions: test → build → push image → deploy
scalingDecisions: Connection pooling via pgx for efficient DB connections under load
Stateless API design — horizontally scalable behind a load balancer
Docker multi-stage build keeps image under 20MB
futureImprovements: Add Redis L2 cache for hot questions
Full-text search with pgvector or Elasticsearch
caseStudy.impact: Demonstrates ability to own the full engineering lifecycle: design, implement, test, containerise, and deploy.
